theme: The Pro Tour — Content & Interactive Features

shots.title: Content audit & rewrite

hazards.description: NineteenthHole.astro edit failed due to indentation mismatch in old_string — required re-reading exact line content

shots.notes: Updated 10 files: live-stats.ts (replaced CaddyStack fields with SLOPE data), Problem, Framework, WhyGolf, HazardMap, NineteenthHole, Results, CTA, Scorecard sections, and slope-framework.astro (added 6 new sections: CLI Commands, Guard Framework, Metaphor Engine, Plugin System, Flow Tracking, Roadmap Tools). All CaddyStack content references replaced except live-stats API URL (out of scope).

shots.title: Install command toggle
shots.notes: Added npm/pnpm/bun tabbed install toggle to Hero.astro with clipboard copy and localStorage persistence. initInstallToggle() in interactions.ts follows existing section-level import pattern.

shots.title: Metaphor switcher
shots.notes: Created src/data/metaphors.json (~6KB, 2.3KB gzipped) with all 6 metaphor vocabularies. Fixed-position dropdown in Base.astro, FOUC prevention via inline head script reading localStorage. Dynamic import keeps metaphor data in separate chunk. Added data-term attributes across 7 section files.

shots.title: New sections & polish
shots.notes: Created GettingStarted.astro (4-step quick start) and Packages.astro (4-package grid with SVG icons). Inserted into index.astro page order.

conditions.description: Low slope factor — all work in established Astro site with known patterns
slope-framework.astro is 60KB — required careful section-by-section editing rather than full rewrite

nutrition.description: Clean build after each ticket — npm run build verified between every commit
Commit-per-ticket discipline — 4 commits pushed sequentially after each ticket completed
No new tests added — sprint was content and UI only. Existing 1091 tests unaffected.
Whitespace mismatch in NineteenthHole edit caught immediately — re-read file and fixed before commit

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Smooth sprint with low resistance. Slope 2 was accurate — all work was content updates and UI additions in an established Astro site with clear patterns to follow. The metaphor switcher was the most complex ticket but the data-attribute pattern made it clean.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: When editing Astro files with the Edit tool, always re-read the exact lines you plan to replace — indentation and whitespace in .astro files can differ from what you expect, especially in deeply nested HTML. The slope-framework.astro file is 60KB; edit targeted sections rather than attempting full rewrites.
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: The metaphor JSON data was only ~6KB for all 6 metaphors with full vocabulary mappings. Dynamic import keeps it out of the main bundle. The FOUC prevention pattern (inline script in head reading localStorage) is simple but critical for theme-switching UIs.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: The marketing site now fully reflects SLOPE S1-S27 capabilities with interactive features. Next could be the SLOPE-native stats API to replace the CaddyStack endpoint, or the slope.dev domain setup.

bunker_locations: Astro file whitespace — Edit tool old_string must exactly match file indentation, which varies across .astro sections
slope-framework.astro is 60KB — never attempt full-file rewrites, always edit targeted sections
yardage_book_updates: slope-web/src/data/metaphors.json: static vocabulary for 6 metaphors, dynamically imported by interactions.ts
slope-web/src/scripts/interactions.ts: initInstallToggle() + initMetaphorSwitcher() — both use localStorage persistence
slope-web/src/layouts/Base.astro: FOUC prevention inline script + metaphor switcher dropdown UI
slope-web/src/pages/slope-framework.astro: 6 new sections (CLI, Guards, Metaphors, Plugins, Flows, Roadmap) — now ~90KB
live-stats.ts: interface fields changed — cli_commands, guards, packages, metaphors replace endpoints, mobile_screens, migrations
course_management_notes: 4 tickets, par 4, score 4 — clean par with 1 minor hazard absorbed
Slope 2 confirmed appropriate — content + UI in established site, no new infrastructure
13+ files modified across slope-web, 2 new files created (metaphors.json, GettingStarted.astro, Packages.astro)
All CaddyStack content references removed except live-stats API URL (intentionally out of scope)
